rationale: The citing article is an editorial strategy piece (not an empirical/modeling study) focused on JMR policy, review process, and transparency, with no indication it applies or builds on specific endogeneity estimators. The cited work is a technical control-function method paper, and the only linkage shown is a single DOI-matched reference entry with no contextual citation text, which makes this look like an illustrative/background mention rather than substantive methodological use.
